LAW AND MOTION 302, LAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) NA'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DISMISSAL IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 28, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 302 BY 4:00 PM ON JANUARY 9, 2013 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) NA'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DISMISSAL IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. PLAINTIFF MAY RE-FILE ITS COMPLAINT. DEPARTMENT 302 DECLINES TO SET THE MATTER FOR OSC RE: SERVICE AS THIS REQUEST IS WITHIN THE PURVIEW OF DEPARTMENT 610. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of plaintiff. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Continued To Jun-26-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn For Relief From Dismissal
Off Calendar Jan-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) NA's Motion For Relief From Dismissal is Granted. No opposition filed and for good cause shown. Plaintiff may re-file its complaint. Department 302 declines to set the matter for OSC re: Service as this request is within the purview of Department 610. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn For Relief From Dismissal
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Continued To Jan-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) NA'S Motion For Relief From Dismissal is continued to January 28, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the motion to Department 302 by 4:00 pm on January 9, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)
